Title: OpenClaw: Pairing pending-request caps were enforced per channel instead of per account
Description: Before OpenClaw 2026.3.31, pending pairing-request caps were enforced per channel file instead of per account. On multi-account channel setups, requests from other accounts could fill the shared pending window and block new pairing challenges on an unaffected account.
NotImpacted: All versions before 2026.2.26, all versions starting from 2026.3.31
